title: Combustion_dynamics_of_a_low-swirl_combustor
text:

Here is the technical content extracted from the provided text:

1.  **Mathematical equations:**
    *   0.  1 ± 0.01% (peak-to-peak pressure inside the chamber of 0.1 ± 0.01% of the atmospheric pressure)
    * phi = 0.5, 0.6, 0.75

2.  **Graphs/charts:** NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

3.  **Tables:**
    *   Table 1: Indicates experimental details and nozzle exit velocity. (details are not listed in provided text)

4.  **Diagrams:**
    *   Combustion chamber layout (Fig. 1):
        *   Components: Loudspeaker, Pressure Transducer, ICCD (Intensified Charge-Coupled Device), Data Acquisition, YAG Laser, DYE Laser, Mixer/Doubler.
    *   Swirl Burner (Figs. 2 and 3) (not shown just mentioned in text)

5.  **Key numbers, constants, parameters:**
    *   Linde air-flow meter/controller: 18C-202-4125 (~50 slpm)
    *   Hastings flow meter/controller: HFC-203A (~300 slpm)
    *   Equivalence ratios: phi = 0.5, 0.6, 0.75
    *   Total volume flow rate: ~120 slpm
    *   Nozzle exit velocity: 4 m/s
    *   Swirl number: ~0.7
    *   Nozzle inner diameter: 2.54 cm
    *   Swirler location: 3.81 cm below burner exit
    *   Number of swirler blades: 8
    *   Swirler blade thickness: ~1 mm
    *   Swirler blade angle (alpha): ~65 degrees
    *   Speakers: 30 cm diameter, 1000-W power amplifier
    *   Atmospheric Pressure oscillation: 0.1 +/- 0.01%

title: Combustion_dynamics_of_a_low-swirl_combustor
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 5]
Here's the extracted technical content from the provided text:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

   *   ΔE = ( (gamma - 1) / gamma ) * integral(dV) * integral( (p'/p) * (q'/Q) ) dt (Equation 1)
   *   Rf = integral from 0 to 1 ( (p'*q') / (Prms*q) ) d(xi) (Equation 2)
        *Integrals and fractions are difficult to express in plain text

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

   *   Figure 4: Image of the time-averaged OH-PLIF signal.
        *   Components indicated: "Velocity Profile measured", "Flame border"

**3. Tables:**

   *   Table 1: Flow rates
        *   Headers: "Equivalence ratio", "Flow rates", "Volumetric (L/s)", "Mass (g/s)"
        *   Data:
            *   Equivalence ratio 0.5: Fuel 0.098 L/s, Air 1.87 L/s, Fuel 0.065 g/s, Air 2.28 g/s
            *   Equivalence ratio 0.6: Fuel 0.116 L/s, Air 1.85 L/s, Fuel 0.0776 g/s, Air 2.22 g/s
            *   Equivalence ratio 0.75: Fuel 0.143 L/s, Air 1.82 L/s, Fuel 0.096 g/s, Air 2.18 g/s

**4. Diagrams:**

   *   Figure 2: Swirler
        *   Components: Swirling Flow (dotted lines), Axial Flow (Solid lines), Vane (Swirl Blade), Mixture Flow Direction
   *   Figure 3: Swirl Burner Assembly:
        *   Components: Burner, Swirler, Upper Part of Premixer, Fuel, Lower Part of Premixer, Grid Mixer, Air

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

   *   Premixer diameter: 7.62 cm
   *   Premixer length: 46 cm
   *   Axial flow versus outer swirling flow ratio: 1/2
   *   phi = 0.6
   *   Driving acoustic frequency: 85 Hz
